name: Alien Dictionary
description: Given a list of words sorted lexicographically by the rules of an unknown alien language, derive the order of characters in that language. Return a string of the unique characters in the alien language sorted in the alien order. If the order is invalid (contains a cycle), return an empty string. If there are multiple valid orderings, return any one of them. All characters in the input are lowercase English letters.
tests:
def test_multiple_valid_orderings():
    result = alien_order(['z', 'x', 'y'])
    assert result.index('z') < result.index('x')
    assert result.index('x') < result.index('y')
constraints: All characters are lowercase English letters
Return empty string if ordering is invalid (cycle detected)
If a longer word is a prefix of a shorter word that appears after it, the ordering is invalid
Use topological sort on character dependency graph
